requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions (Radiated and Conducted) — INN / NCh Standards
requirement_topic.zh: EMC发射（辐射和传导）——INN / NCh标准
requirement_topic.zht: EMC發射（輻射和傳導）——INN / NCh標準

summary.en: Chile adopts INN (Instituto Nacional de Normalización) NCh standards that harmonise international IEC and CISPR standards for EMC. For radiated and conducted emissions, applicable NCh standards align with CISPR 32 / CISPR 22 and IEC 61000-3-2/-3 for connected equipment. SUBTEL technical requirements for homologated radio equipment reference these EMC limits. Test reports from ILAC-accredited or SUBTEL-recognised laboratories are generally expected.
summary.zh: 智利采用INN（智利国家标准化研究所）的NCh标准，协调国际IEC和CISPR EMC标准。对于辐射和传导发射，适用NCh标准与联网设备的CISPR 32 / CISPR 22及IEC 61000-3-2/-3对齐。均质化无线电设备的SUBTEL技术要求参照这些EMC限值。通常需要ILAC认可或SUBTEL认可实验室出具的测试报告。
summary.zht: 智利採用INN（智利國家標準化研究所）的NCh標準，協調國際IEC和CISPR EMC標準。對於輻射和傳導發射，適用NCh標準與聯網裝置的CISPR 32 / CISPR 22及IEC 61000-3-2/-3對齊。均質化無線電裝置的SUBTEL技術要求參照這些EMC限值。通常需要ILAC認可或SUBTEL認可實驗室出具的測試報告。

standards_or_laws: NCh standards harmonising CISPR 32 / IEC 55032 (emissions from multimedia equipment)
NCh standards harmonising CISPR 22 / IEC 55022 (legacy IT equipment emissions)
NCh standards harmonising IEC 61000-3-2 (harmonic current emissions)
NCh standards harmonising IEC 61000-3-3 (voltage fluctuations and flicker)
SUBTEL technical requirements for radio equipment homologation

summary.en: China requires GB/T 9254 (harmonised with CISPR 32/22) for radiated and conducted emissions from IT and multimedia equipment, and GB/T 17625.1 (harmonised with IEC 61000-3-2) for harmonic current emissions. These Chinese test reports cover similar technical scope but are issued under Chinese national standards and are not directly accepted by Chilean SUBTEL or INN.
summary.zh: 中国对信息技术设备和多媒体设备的辐射和传导发射要求执行GB/T 9254（协调CISPR 32/22），对谐波电流发射执行GB/T 17625.1（协调IEC 61000-3-2）。这些中国测试报告涵盖类似技术范围，但依据中国国家标准出具，智利SUBTEL或INN不直接接受。
summary.zht: 中國對資訊技術裝置和多媒體裝置的輻射和傳導發射要求執行GB/T 9254（協調CISPR 32/22），對諧波電流發射執行GB/T 17625.1（協調IEC 61000-3-2）。這些中國測試報告涵蓋類似技術範圍，但依據中國國家標準出具，智利SUBTEL或INN不直接接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment: radio disturbance characteristics (CISPR 32/22 harmonised, China)
GB/T 17625.1 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (IEC 61000-3-2 harmonised, China)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 9254 and GB/T 17625.1 test reports are not directly accepted by SUBTEL or INN. New EMC test reports against applicable NCh/IEC-harmonised limits, from an ILAC-accredited or SUBTEL-recognised laboratory, are expected as part of the homologation dossier. The underlying technical limits are often aligned with CISPR/IEC, but the report issuer and format must comply with Chilean requirements.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 9254和GB/T 17625.1测试报告不被SUBTEL或INN直接接受。均质化申请材料中须提供由ILAC认可或SUBTEL认可实验室出具的针对适用NCh/IEC协调限值的新EMC测试报告。底层技术限值通常与CISPR/IEC对齐，但报告发布机构和格式须符合智利要求。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 9254和GB/T 17625.1測試報告不被SUBTEL或INN直接接受。均質化申請材料中須提供由ILAC認可或SUBTEL認可實驗室出具的針對適用NCh/IEC協調限值的新EMC測試報告。底層技術限值通常與CISPR/IEC對齊，但報告發布機構和格式須符合智利要求。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC emissions compliance via applicable NCh/IEC-harmonised standards is part of the SUBTEL homologation technical dossier. Chinese GB-standard test reports are not directly recognised; new reports from ILAC-accredited laboratories aligned with Chilean NCh limits are typically required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 通过适用NCh/IEC协调标准的EMC发射合规是SUBTEL均质化技术档案的组成部分。中国GB标准测试报告不被直接认可；通常需要认可实验室出具符合智利NCh限值的新报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 通過適用NCh/IEC協調標準的EMC發射合規是SUBTEL均質化技術檔案的組成部分。中國GB標準測試報告不被直接認可；通常需要認可實驗室出具符合智利NCh限值的新報告。

summary.en: For EMC immunity, applicable NCh standards harmonise IEC 61000-4 series tests (electrostatic discharge, electrical fast transients, surge, conducted immunity, radiated immunity, voltage dips). Requirements apply where product category standards mandate them and are referenced within SUBTEL technical homologation criteria for certain equipment classes.
summary.zh: 对于EMC抗扰度，适用NCh标准协调IEC 61000-4系列测试（静电放电、电快速瞬变、浪涌、传导抗扰度、辐射抗扰度、电压暂降）。要求适用于产品类别标准规定的场合，并在特定设备类别的SUBTEL技术均质化标准中予以引用。
summary.zht: 對於EMC抗擾度，適用NCh標準協調IEC 61000-4系列測試（靜電放電、電快速瞬變、浪湧、傳導抗擾度、輻射抗擾度、電壓暫降）。要求適用於產品類別標準規定的場合，並在特定裝置類別的SUBTEL技術均質化標準中予以引用。

standards_or_laws: NCh standards harmonising IEC 61000-4-2 (electrostatic discharge immunity)
NCh standards harmonising IEC 61000-4-3 (radiated RF immunity)
NCh standards harmonising IEC 61000-4-4 (electrical fast transient/burst immunity)
NCh standards harmonising IEC 61000-4-6 (conducted disturbance immunity)
NCh standards harmonising IEC 61000-4-11 (voltage dips and interruptions immunity)

summary.en: China's immunity requirements are set out in the GB/T 17626 series (harmonised with IEC 61000-4 series) and applied via product-specific standards. CCC certification for applicable product classes includes immunity test coverage. However, Chinese laboratory reports referencing GB/T standards are not directly accepted in Chile.
summary.zh: 中国的抗扰度要求由GB/T 17626系列（协调IEC 61000-4系列）规定，并通过产品专项标准应用。适用产品类别的CCC认证包含抗扰度测试覆盖。但引用GB/T标准的中国实验室报告在智利不被直接接受。
summary.zht: 中國的抗擾度要求由GB/T 17626系列（協調IEC 61000-4系列）規定，並通過產品專項標準應用。適用產品類別的CCC認證包含抗擾度測試覆蓋。但引用GB/T標準的中國實驗室報告在智利不被直接接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17626 series — Electromagnetic compatibility testing and measurement techniques (IEC 61000-4 harmonised, China)
CCC certification (where applicable product class includes immunity testing)

gap.en: Immunity test reports from Chinese accredited laboratories citing GB/T 17626 are not directly accepted by SUBTEL or INN. New immunity test reports from ILAC-accredited laboratories against applicable NCh/IEC 61000-4 limits are required for the homologation dossier. The technical test parameters are often equivalent, but the report format and laboratory accreditation must meet Chilean requirements.
gap.zh: 引用GB/T 17626的中国认可实验室出具的抗扰度测试报告不被SUBTEL或INN直接接受。均质化申请材料须提供ILAC认可实验室针对适用NCh/IEC 61000-4限值出具的新抗扰度测试报告。技术测试参数通常等效，但报告格式和实验室认可资质须满足智利要求。
gap.zht: 引用GB/T 17626的中國認可實驗室出具的抗擾度測試報告不被SUBTEL或INN直接接受。均質化申請材料須提供ILAC認可實驗室針對適用NCh/IEC 61000-4限值出具的新抗擾度測試報告。技術測試參數通常等效，但報告格式和實驗室認可資質須滿足智利要求。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC immunity compliance under NCh/IEC 61000-4 series is required as part of the SUBTEL homologation technical dossier where the applicable product standard mandates it. Chinese GB/T 17626 test reports are not directly recognised in Chile; new reports from ILAC-accredited laboratories are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在适用产品标准有规定的情况下，符合NCh/IEC 61000-4系列的EMC抗扰度合规是SUBTEL均质化技术档案的组成部分。中国GB/T 17626测试报告在智利不被直接认可；须提供ILAC认可实验室出具的新报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在適用產品標準有規定的情況下，符合NCh/IEC 61000-4系列的EMC抗擾度合規是SUBTEL均質化技術檔案的組成部分。中國GB/T 17626測試報告在智利不被直接認可；須提供ILAC認可實驗室出具的新報告。
